channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says oil and trust with new leader will drive a long-term U.S.-Iraq friendship
item.description: President Trump and Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi on Tuesday hailed a new era of relations in which American oil companies in the Mideast country ...

item.title: The Senate Doesn't Need a Change in Rules. It Needs a Change in Behavior
item.description: Senators can make every day count by discussing difficult issues with each other.

item.title: 'He was a fantastic man,' Trump honors Lindsey Graham, orders flags at half-mast through Saturday
item.description: President Trump ordered flags nationwide to fly at half-mast until Saturday evening in honor of Sen. Lindsey Graham.

item.title: Starting Families And Buying Homes Are Becoming Over-40 Activities — And That's Bad For Civilization
item.description: Milestones like homeownership, marriage, and children are being delayed until later in life.
